primary.description: Indigo/Blue - Use only for Primary CTAs (Login button, Create Agent, Create Event).

background.description: Clean, neutral background. Not pure white or pure black.

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-surface border-r border-border transition-transform z-50
sidebar.links: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium hover:bg-secondary/10 hover:text-primary transition-colors

topbar.style: sticky top-0 z-40 flex h-16 w-full items-center justify-between border-b border-border bg-surface/80 backdrop-blur-xl px-6

cards.style: bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.header: flex flex-row items-center justify-between pb-2 space-y-0

tables.header: bg-muted/50 border-y border-border px-4 py-3 font-medium

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm transition-all focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50

forms.input: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2 for a clean, sharp look. Size generally 16px (w-4 h-4) or 20px (w-5 h-5).

login_background.description: Abstract blue geometric pattern. Overlay with bg-black/50 or bg-white/20 based on theme for the login screen.

login.layout: Two-column split on desktop (Image left, Form right), Single column on mobile.
login.behavior: Separate forms or toggle for Admin vs Agent login.

dashboard.overview: Bento grid or row of 3-4 metric cards.
dashboard.tables: Full width with inline actions (Edit/Delete). Badge components for status (Active/Inactive).

state_and_auth.mock_auth: Use React Context or Zustand with LocalStorage to simulate login state and current user (role: admin | agent).
state_and_auth.persistence: Store Agents, Events, and Students in LocalStorage. Hydrate on initial load.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='agent-table-row-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI for structured components like Dialogs, Selects, Tables, Inputs, and Forms.
Ensure dark/light mode uses Tailwind's 'dark:' variant class strategy.
Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Inter' for body text. Do not use Inter for headings.
Implement the UI focusing on clarity and dense data scanning (Archetype 4 - Swiss/High-Contrast).
Forms must use proper accessible labels.
Include local storage logic for data persistence as requested.
